category_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery README says httpx runs multiple HTTP probes and is associated with cybersecurity and pentest-tool topics.
source_facts.description says httpx is a fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit.
display_name_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery repository and docs use httpx.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to docs.projectdiscovery.io/tools/httpx; dedicated official docs are available at https://docs.projectdiscovery.io/tools/httpx/overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/projectdiscovery/httpx; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README lists multiple HTTP probes and GitHub topics include cli, http, osint, cybersecurity, bugbounty, and pentest-tool.
source_facts.description identifies a multi-purpose HTTP toolkit.
